packages.name: RPM Fusion
packages.description: Enables RPM Fusion free and nonfree repositories (required by steam, akmod-nvidia, xorg-x11-drv-nvidia-cuda, etc.)

packages.name: Steam
packages.description: Gaming platform, launcher and store from Valve (depends on rpmfusion)

packages.name: Claude Code
packages.description: Anthropic's official CLI agent for software engineering tasks

packages.name: NetBird
packages.description: WireGuard-based zero-config private network (daemon + GUI tray client)

packages.name: Antidote
packages.description: Minimal zsh plugin manager (installed to ~/.antidote, sourced from .zshrc)

packages.name: Starship
packages.description: Minimal, blazing-fast cross-shell prompt (installed to /usr/local/bin via official installer)

packages.name: MesloLGS Nerd Font
packages.description: Patched Meslo font with powerline/devicon glyphs needed by starship (installed to ~/.local/share/fonts)

packages.name: Rust
packages.description: Rust toolchain (rustc, cargo) via the official rustup installer (~/.cargo, ~/.rustup)

packages.name: Docker
packages.description: Docker CE (engine, CLI, containerd, buildx, compose) from Docker's official repo; enables daemon and adds user to docker group

setup.name: Flatpak
setup.description: Adds the flathub remote system-wide (required by everything in flatpak.json)
